name: lurii-cc
description: Personal portfolio management for Lurii Finance: portfolio-advisor produces a Russian-language quantitative review (with a clarify-via-AskUserQuestion step + memory-curator handoff) and renders it as a live Cowork artifact. memory-init bootstraps memory/; memory-curator keeps it up to date. categorization-curator iterates on lurii-finance type/category rules — fixes unknowns, audits dead/shadowed rules, dedups, links cross-source transfers via validate + dry-run + confirm. Bundles the lurii-finance MCP server (pfm-mcp).
